steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description: Before writing code, I identify business goals, technical constraints and real user needs.

steps.title: Design the solution
steps.description: I define a scalable architecture prioritizing maintainability, performance and long-term evolvability.

steps.title: Build with quality
steps.description: I implement modern solutions with clear standards, clean code and focus on user experience.

steps.title: Measure and improve
steps.description: I analyze results, identify optimization opportunities and continuously evolve the product.
